title: AI-SDLC Review Attestation v3
description: DSSE envelope (https://github.com/secure-systems-lab/dsse) carrying a v3 review-attestation predicate. AISDLC-103 (Verifier Phase 3) narrows the schemaVersion allowlist to `['v3']` and drops the legacy `diffHash` (v1, AISDLC-74/-84) and `contentHash` (v2, AISDLC-94) content bindings — only `contentHashV3` (per-file (base, head) blob-pair transition, AISDLC-101) remains. Predicates carrying `diffHash` or `contentHash` are explicitly rejected by the in-process shape validator (= a v1/v2 envelope smuggling itself in as v3). Schema for /ai-sdlc execute Step 10 outputs at .ai-sdlc/attestations/<commit-sha>.dsse.json — verified by .github/workflows/verify-attestation.yml.

payloadType.description: Vendor URI for the AI-SDLC review-attestation predicate. Bound by DSSE PAE so a signature for one payloadType can never be replayed onto another.

payload.description: Base64-encoded JSON of the predicate. Decoded predicate must conform to the `predicate` definition in this schema.

keyid.description: Identifier of the public key that produced this signature. Free-form, typically <identity>:<machine>.

sig.description: Base64-encoded raw ed25519 signature (64 bytes → 88 b64 chars).

schemaVersion.description: MANDATORY. Allowlist enforced by CI — AISDLC-103 narrowed to ['v3'] only. v1 (pre-AISDLC-94) and v2 (the AISDLC-94 dual-hash window) envelopes are now rejected with a schemaVersion-allowlist reason.

sha1.description: Git commit SHA-1 (40 lowercase hex chars).

contentHashV3.description: MANDATORY. sha256 over a sorted canonical line-per-file string of `<path>\t<fileDeltaHash>\n` for every changed file in `<base>...<head>`, where `fileDeltaHash[path] = sha256(<base_blob_sha> + ' -> ' + <head_blob_sha>)`. Base blob SHA is read at the merge-base of <baseRef>+<headRef>; head blob SHA at <headRef>. Survives sibling-overlap rebases via the per-file delta binding. AISDLC-101 introduced the field; AISDLC-103 made it required.

policyHash.description: sha256 of `.ai-sdlc/review-policy.md` at attestation time. Mismatch = policy edited since signing.

agentId.description: Matches the `name` field of the reviewer agent .md file (e.g. 'code-reviewer').

agentFileHash.description: sha256 of the reviewer agent's .md file at attestation time. Mismatch = agent file changed since signing.

findings.description: Counts only — full verdict JSON lives in PR body for human review.

pluginVersion.description: Version of ai-sdlc-plugin/plugin.json at attestation time.

pipelineVersion.description: Optional. Semver-shaped version of @ai-sdlc/pipeline-cli at attestation time (AISDLC-100.6 / RFC-0012 Phase 6). Forensic / audit purpose only — verifier logs but does NOT enforce.

iterationCount.description: Number of dev rounds (re-implementation passes) the work went through. ONE attestation per RUN — earlier iterations are not separately attested.

harnessNote.description: Empty string when reviewer-independence was enforced; warning string when fallback occurred (e.g. '⚠ INDEPENDENCE NOT ENFORCED (codex unavailable, fell back to claude-code)').
